text: Julian Ross was vaguely aware of the setting sun casting long shadows through the ornate windows, marking the passage of hours. As night fell, the hackathon took on a different atmosphere. The initial buzz had given way to a focused intensity, punctuated by occasional outbursts of triumph or frustration.
context: Julian Ross is working with Hezekiah Bean and Sienna Lyles to stop a security breach at the hackathon.
